title: Asia Centric: Is China’s Property Market Finally Recovering?
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：中国房地产市场终于复苏了吗？
summary: China’s property market is showing signs of life after a five-year slump, prompting some analysts to call for a long-awaited rebound. Price declines for newly built homes are narrowing, while transaction volumes are finally ticking up, particularly in top-tier cities. But is this a significant turnaround or just a dead cat bounce?

title_cn: SpaceX 让一些银行对 IPO 阵容中的初级角色感到恼火
summary: Several junior banks marketing shares in SpaceX’s landmark listing are working for relatively small fees and being relegated to roles that don’t come with any credit, according to people familiar with the matter.

summary: Federal sports betting regulation, IPO list-keeping, an expanding stock market and questionable league-table rankings.

title: SpaceX IPO Is Said to Be More Than Four Times Oversubscribed
title_cn: 据称 SpaceX IPO 超额认购超过四倍
summary: SpaceX’s initial public offering has attracted demand for more than four times the available shares, according to people familiar with the matter, ahead of the Elon Musk-led rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence firm stopping taking orders.

summary: From Bitcoin to Bullion, speculative trades are unravelling. SpaceX is next.

title_cn: 马斯克在 SpaceX IPO 前几天呼吁英国抗议
summary: Elon Musk should be busy preparing for the biggest stock market listing ever. But he’s still finding time to intervene in British politics.

title: Stock Movers: Robinhood, Super Micro Computer, Oracle (Podcast)
title_cn: 股票推动者：Robinhood、超微计算机、甲骨文（播客）
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 3:34

title: Warsh May Tackle Inflation in New Way: Fmr. Fed Governor
title_cn: 沃什可能会以新方式应对通胀：Fmr.美联储理事
summary: Former Federal Reserve Governor and former Wells Fargo chair Betsy Duke analyzed the recent inflation data, noting that headline and core inflation figures came in as expected but remain concerning for everyday consumers. She emphasized that while the Federal Reserve committee is unlikely to take immediate action at the next meeting, the persistent rise in living costs—especially energy prices—continues to outpace wage growth, creating financial strain for many households. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Surges as Fresh US Strikes on Iran Threaten Fragile Truce
title_cn: 美国对伊朗的新打击威胁脆弱的停战协议，油价飙升
summary: Oil jumped after the US started new strikes on Iran, putting further strain on a fragile ceasefire and threatening to prolong the conflict in the Middle East that’s upended global markets.

title: DIGITAL Ben Hylak
title_cn: 数字本·海拉克
summary:
Ben Hylak, founder and CTO of AI monitor Raindrop, says that the ability for AI to fix its own mistakes is the last 'big problem to solve' for humanity and that his company's role is to help companies 'raise the floor' of how AI models work in their system. 
Hylak, a former SpaceX and Apple engineer, also commented on the upcoming IPO, saying that SpaceX is one of the most 'mission driven' companies he's been a part of.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Key Military Mineral Stores Depleted By Iran War Says US Mining Heads
title_cn: 美国矿业负责人表示，主要军事矿产储备因伊朗战争而耗尽
summary: Paul Andre Huet, chairman & CEO of Americas Gold & Silver, and Gary Evans, CEO of US Antimony, discussed the impact of war with Iran on US critical minerals supplies and how the ramp up in tech IPOs has increased demand, even as metals prices have slumped in recent days. Huet, speaking on the rise of resources for artificial intelligence IPOs, said that silver is going to be the 'new power revolution.'  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Citizen CEO on First-Ever FIFA Halftime Show
title_cn: 全球公民首席执行官首次参加国际足联中场秀
summary: Hugh Evans, CEO of Global Citizen, joined the program to discuss the upcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup, highlighting the first-ever halftime show for the tournament. Curated by Chris Martin of Coldplay, the halftime event will feature performances by Madonna, BTS, and Shakira, and is expected to be the most viewed halftime show in history. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Retired Gen. Kimmitt: Hormuz, Lebanon Are ‘Diversions'
title_cn: 退役将军基米特：霍尔木兹和黎巴嫩是“消遣”
summary: Oil prices increased by about 2% following escalated threats from the US President to 'hit Iran hard' after delays in peace negotiations. Retired US Army Brigadier General Mark Kimmit, Former Assistant Secretary of State for Political Military Affairs, joined the discussion to analyze the shift in US posture. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Treasury Eases Legal Restrictions Across Venezuela Licenses
title_cn: 美国财政部放宽对委内瑞拉许可证的法律限制
summary: The Trump administration amended its Venezuela licenses to loosen US-related legal provisions as it seeks to facilitate investment in the country’s oil and other natural resources.

title: Chevron Among Drillers to Feed Argentina Shale NGL Venture
title_cn: 雪佛龙等钻井公司将为阿根廷页岩液化天然气项目提供原料
summary: Chevron Corp. and two other major Argentine shale producers will sign contracts this week to supply a natural gas liquids project, a move that all but assures the $3 billion plan goes ahead, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Stock Investors Eye Deep Run for Japan at Football World Cup
title_cn: 股票投资者关注日本在足球世界杯上的深度竞争
summary: Japan enters the 2026 football World Cup as Asia’s top-ranked team, fueling hopes that the Samurai Blue can finally reach the quarterfinals and lift shares of streaming, food and beverage companies along the way.

title: Tech Stocks Sink as Oil Jumps on US-Iran Jitters: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗的紧张局势导致石油价格上涨，科技股下跌：市场结束
summary: Wall Street was rattled by a renewed selloff in some of the world’s largest technology companies, with stocks also falling as a flare-up in geopolitical tensions lifted oil prices.

title: Bond Traders Bet on a Fed Hike in 2026 Even After Soft Core CPI
title_cn: 即使在软核心 CPI 出现之后，债券交易员仍押注美联储 2026 年加息
summary: Bond traders maintained bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates by the end of the year, even after a soft US core inflation reading eased pressure on Chairman Kevin Warsh to act sooner.

title: Cancer Drugmaker Parabilis Surges 58% in US Trading Debut
title_cn: 癌症药物制造商 Parabilis 在美国上市首日股价飙升 58%
summary: Parabilis Medicines Inc. shares jumped 58% in its trading debut, after the company raised nearly $745 million in an upsized US initial public offering that priced above its marketed range and a private placement.

title: Citi Says Investors Growing More Selective on Data Center Bonds
title_cn: 花旗称投资者对数据中心债券的选择性越来越高
summary: Bond investors are increasingly scrutinizing financing deals linked to artificial intelligence infrastructure buildouts, according to Citigroup Inc. analysts.

title: Man Accused of $37 Billion LA Fire Is Innocent, His Lawyer Says
title_cn: 被指控造成 370 亿美元洛杉矶火灾的男子是无辜的，他的律师称
summary: Jonathan Rinderknecht has been wrongly accused of starting the most destructive wildfire in Los Angeles history, his lawyer told a jury.

title: Latham’s Kelly Forecasts Private Equity-Fueled Second-Half Surge
title_cn: 莱瑟姆的凯利预测下半年私募股权将激增
summary: Mega deals will likely continue driving an M&A resurgence that will accelerate in the second half of 2026, with private equity keeping the pace, predicts Alex Kelly of Latham & Watkins.

title: An Evening With Bloomberg Weekend
title_cn: 彭博周末之夜
summary:
Bloomberg.com subscribers join us at our London headquarters on 10 June for a special live edition of Bloomberg Weekend. Mishal Husain hosts a discussion about the state of UK politics and if things have gotten better since Brexit. Bloomberg Weekend executive editor Katherine Bell then speaks with author Alexander Starritt on “Drayton and Mackenzie,” a 2025 Bloomberg Book of the Year.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Nike Keeps Stumbling
title_cn: 为什么耐克总是跌跌撞撞
summary:
The return of Elliott Hill to lead Nike was supposed to reinvigorate the brand. Instead, setbacks in running, product development and brand strategy have kept the swoosh from once again hitting its stride.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Tells Investors It Has Lined Up Blue-Chip Credit Ratings
title_cn: SpaceX 告诉投资者它已经确定了蓝筹股信用评级
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is telling investors it has lined up investment-grade ratings from three major bond graders, according to people with knowledge of the matter, which could help the company cut funding costs as it continues to raise financing after its initial public offering.

title: Major US Banks Face Federal Probe Over Debanking Allegations
title_cn: 美国主要银行因银行业务剥离指控面临联邦调查
summary: Federal prosecutors are looking into whether some of Wall Street’s biggest lenders illegally dropped customers for political reasons, according to a person familiar with the probe.

title: The Golden Age of IPOs is Here: IPOX's Schuster
title_cn: IPO 的黄金时代已经到来：IPOX 的舒斯特
summary:
Josef Schuster, founder and CEO of IPOX Schuster, joins Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Deals." SpaceX is offering 555.6 million shares at a fixed price of $135 each, which would raise about $75 billion. The stock is set to start trading on June 12. The IPO is expected to rank as the biggest ever, topping Saudi Aramco’s $29.4 billion listing in 2019.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Price Tag is 'Very Steep': Renaissance's Kennedy
title_cn: SpaceX 的价格标签“非常陡峭”：文艺复兴公司的肯尼迪
summary:
Matt Kennedy, senior strategist at Renaissance Capital joins Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Deals." SpaceX is offering 555.6 million shares at a fixed price of $135 each, which would raise about $75 billion. The stock is set to start trading on June 12. The IPO is expected to rank as the biggest ever, topping Saudi Aramco’s $29.4 billion listing in 2019.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK’s Reeves to Lower Tax Burden for Wealthy US Expats
title_cn: 英国里夫斯将降低富裕美国侨民的税收负担
summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves said she will ease the tax burden faced by rich US investors wanting to relocate to the UK.

title: Capitalism Is a Fact of Life, Starritt Says
title_cn: 斯塔里特说，资本主义是生活的一个事实
summary: Bloomberg Weekend executive editor Katherine Bell talks to author Alexander Starritt on “Drayton and Mackenzie,” a 2025 Bloomberg Book of the Year. He says capitalism is just a fact of human life at an event for Bloomberg.com subscribers held in London. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CIBC to Offer SpaceX Access Through Depositary Receipt
title_cn: CIBC 将通过存托凭证向 SpaceX 提供准入权
summary: Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce is set to offer Canadians access to SpaceX through a vehicle that gives local investors access to global stocks.

title: Why Starritt Wrote 'Drayton and Mackenzie'
title_cn: 为什么斯塔里特写了《德雷顿和麦肯齐》
summary: Bloomberg Weekend executive editor Katherine Bell talks to interview author Alexander Starritt on “Drayton and Mackenzie,” a 2025 Bloomberg Book of the Year. They speak in London at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Jumps as Trump Threatens to ‘Hit Iran Hard’ Imminently
title_cn: 特朗普威胁立即“严厉打击伊朗”，油价飙升
summary: Oil turned higher as President Donald Trump warned of imminent US attacks against Iran and domestic crude inventories posted another steep drop.

title: Ipsos Poll Shows Majority of Adults Would Rejoin EU
title_cn: 益普索民意调查显示大多数成年人将重新加入欧盟
summary: Alastair Campbell, co-host The Rest Is Politics, and Sir Jacob Rees-Mogg, presenter for GB News, talk about what could happen if there was a vote to rejoin the EU. They speak to Mishal Husain at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event held in London on June 10. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Metals Drop on Renewed Middle East Tensions, US Rate Outlook
title_cn: 中东紧张局势再度升级、美国利率前景导致金属价格下跌
summary: Metals from aluminum to zinc dropped after tensions in the Middle East escalated and expectations for US rate hikes weighed on the demand outlook for commodities.

title: How Will the UK and EU Get Along in 2036?
title_cn: 2036年英国和欧盟将如何相处？
summary: Alastair Campbell, co-host The Rest Is Politics, and Sir Jacob Rees-Mogg, presenter for GB News, talk about how they think the UK and EU will get along in the year 2036. They speak to Mishal Husain at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event held in London on June 10. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Draws Billions in Orders From Middle Eastern Funds
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股吸引了中东基金数十亿美元的订单
summary: Bloomberg Tech Co-Host Caroline Hyde joined Bloomberg's Paul Sweeney and John Tucker to discuss how Gulf wealth funds are pouring billions into SpaceX's IPO. Gulf wealth funds have put in orders for shares worth several billions of dollars in SpaceX’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, the latest indication of the region’s ambitions to continue playing a lead role in bankrolling the global artificial intelligence buildout. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta, X to Face Moratorium on Users Under 16 With New Canada Bill
title_cn: 加拿大新法案将禁止 16 岁以下用户使用 Meta、X
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government has introduced legislation that would ban social media for youth under 16 unless companies such as Meta Platforms Inc. and X Corp. meet a set of safety standards.

title: Oracle Falls After Data Center Costs Overshadow AI Growth
title_cn: 数据中心成本盖过了人工智能增长后甲骨文股价下跌
summary: Oracle Corp. shares declined in extended trading after the company reported quarterly capital expenses that were higher than estimates, raising investor concerns about the profitability of the AI infrastructure business.

title: Goldman’s Gupta: Very Constructive on Earnings Cycle
title_cn: 高盛古普塔：对盈利周期非常有建设性
summary: Anushka Gupta, Head of Americas at Goldman Sachs Apex, to discuss the market developments on a Wednesday afternoon. The conversation centers around the recent decline in stock prices triggered by escalating tensions between the US and Iran. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'Bloom Is Off the Rose' for Oracle, Cleo's Kunst Says
title_cn: Cleo 的 Kunst 表示，Oracle 的“Bloom is Off the Rose”
summary: Sarah Kunst, Cleo Capital founder and managing director, reacts to Oracle's fourth-quarter earnings. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Kunst says she's not shocked investors aren't excited about Oracle right now. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Retail Investor Army Flocks to SpaceX After IPO Drought
title_cn: IPO 遭遇困境后，日本散户投资者纷纷涌向 SpaceX
summary: SpaceX is bringing excitement to corners of the world where investors have long been starved of marquee deals.

title: XAI Co-Founder Babuschkin Unveils New Startup for Personalized AI
title_cn: XAI 联合创始人 Babuschkin 推出个性化人工智能新初创公司
summary: A team of former employees from Elon Musk’s xAI have formed a new startup focused on personalized artificial intelligence, marking perhaps the most high-profile new venture yet from the wave of recent xAI departures.

title: Xbox Plans Significant Layoffs as It Transforms Under New CEO
title_cn: Xbox 计划在新任 CEO 领导下进行转型并大幅裁员
summary: Asha Sharma’s first major cuts will arrive in July

title: Oracle's Earnings 'Really Strong,' RBC's Jaluria Says
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行的 Jaluria 表示，甲骨文的盈利“非常强劲”
summary: Rishi Jaluria, RBC Capital Markets software equity research managing director, reacts to Oracle's fourth-quarter earnings. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Jaluria says Oracle is a bit of a proxy for the AI infrastructure buildout trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon’s Trucking Push Sparks New Slide in Transport Stocks
title_cn: 亚马逊的卡车运输业务引发运输股新一轮下滑
summary: Shares of several large trucking companies plunged on Wednesday after Amazon.com Inc. announced an expansion of its shipping service that has already shaken the transportation and logistics sector and unsettled investors.

title: Factory Robot Startup Mujin Raising Funds Ahead of IPO by 2030
title_cn: 工厂机器人初创公司 Mujin 在 2030 年 IPO 前筹集资金
summary: Japanese robot software developer Mujin plans to go public by 2030, building up funds and momentum to capture fast-growing demand for factory-use AI.

title: Bloomberg Deals 6/10/2026
title_cn: 彭博社优惠 2026 年 6 月 10 日
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: IPOX Schuster Founder & CEO Josef Schuster and Renaissance Capital Senior Strategist Matt Kennedy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CEO of North Growth Management Highlights Strong Earnings Growth Fueled by AI
title_cn: North Growth Management 首席执行官强调人工智能推动的强劲盈利增长
summary: Erica Lau, CEO and Lead Portfolio Manager at North Growth Management, discussed recent corporate earnings and the impact of AI investment on market fundamentals. She noted that the latest quarter showed a remarkable 29% year-over-year earnings growth for S&P 500 companies, significantly surpassing expectations of 13%. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Corporate America Is Giving Up On Women
title_cn: 美国企业正在放弃女性
summary: If corporate America were the meritocracy that everybody claims to want, women would not remain so underrepresented in its most important role, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Beth Kowitt. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Super Micro Plunges on Plan to Raise $7 Billion in Equity
title_cn: Super Micro 计划筹集 70 亿美元股本暴跌
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. fell the most in almost three months after the company announced a plan to raise $7 billion through a package of equity offerings, a move meant to help pay for the production of more artificial intelligence servers.

title: OpenAI Says China-Linked Accounts Aim to Fuel US Data Center Pushback
title_cn: OpenAI 称与中国相关的账户旨在加剧美国数据中心的抵制
summary: OpenAI said a group of ChatGPT accounts with ties to China have sought to stir up local opposition to data centers in the US in a potential bid to hinder the country’s competitiveness in artificial intelligence, echoing recent rhetoric from others in the tech industry.

title: SpaceX IPO Whips Musk Fans Into Frenzy: ‘The More, the Better’
title_cn: SpaceX IPO让马斯克粉丝疯狂：“越多越好”
summary: Anna Watts, a 33-year-old public relations manager in New York, has stashed away $6,500 to buy SpaceX stock after it hits the market Friday. If she had her way, she’d buy even more. She tried to borrow $5,000 from her best friend and applied for a bank loan, too, but both turned her away.

title: Super Micro Seeks $7B in Equity Deal for AI Equipment
title_cn: Super Micro 寻求 70 亿美元的人工智能设备股权交易
summary: Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes joins Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Deals."- Super Micro Computer plans to raise $7 billion through a package of equity offerings to purchase the components needed to fulfill customers’ orders for the company’s AI servers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic CEO Says Government Should Be Able to Block New Models
title_cn: Anthropic首席执行官表示政府应该能够阻止新模式
summary: Anthropic PBC Chief Executive Officer Dario Amodei said the government should have the power to block artificial intelligence developers from deploying new AI models if they present certain risks.

title: AI Data Firm DDN Eyeing a Fresh Funding Round by End of Year
title_cn: 人工智能数据公司 DDN 计划在年底前进行新一轮融资
summary: DDN, a data hardware and software provider that counts Nvidia Corp. as a partner and Alphabet Inc.’s Google and Salesforce Inc. as customers, is looking to raise additional funding by the end of the year, Chief Executive Officer Alex Bouzari said.

title: Apollo Wraps Up $35B Chip Deal for Anthropic
title_cn: Apollo 为 Anthropic 完成了 350 亿美元的芯片交易
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Graffeo joins Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Deals." Apollo Global Management and Blackstone have finalized a $35 billion financing package for Anthropic to expand its AI infrastructure, marking the latest mega-deal in the AI race. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CoreWeave’s Credit Rebound Drives Cheaper Data Center Funding
title_cn: CoreWeave 的信贷反弹推动数据中心融资成本降低
summary: When Applied Digital Corp. first tapped the junk-bond market in November to fund a data center project tied to CoreWeave Inc., it had to stomach a hefty yield to get the deal done. Fast forward to this week, and borrowing costs for another portion of the same project tumbled.

title: New Tracker Traces AI’s Real-Time Impact on Work
title_cn: 新追踪器追踪人工智能对工作的实时影响
summary: Nela Richardson, Chief Economist at ADP and a Bloomberg contributor, says employers need to decide whether AI is going to be a tool for automating roles away or augmenting tasks to create new value. She discusses the new Canaries Dashboard, launched by ADP and the Stanford Digital Economy Lab, to provide real-time indications of how AI is reshaping different occupations based on labor market data. Richardson joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Is Not Safe Yet, Says UCLA Professor
title_cn: 加州大学洛杉矶分校教授表示人工智能尚不安全
summary: As AI giants Anthropic and OpenAI prepare for IPOs, the companies are stressing their efforts to ensure the tech is safe and beneficial for humanity. But Safiya Noble, a UCLA professor and director of the university’s Center on Resilience & Digital Justice, says current AI is not safe, and that stereotypes and biases are being built into training data. Noble joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Has Proved 'Outlandish' Ideas Before: Baillie Gifford’s Singlehurst Says
title_cn: 贝利·吉福德 (Baillie Gifford) 的辛格赫斯特 (Singlehurst) 表示，SpaceX 之前已经证明了“古怪”的想法
summary: With enthusiasm for SpaceX’s IPO building, attention has turned to its orbital data center plans. Peter Singlehurst, head of private companies at Baillie Gifford, says making outlandish ideas work is something the Musk-run company has done multiple times before. Singlehurst speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Multiple Times Oversubscribed | Bloomberg Tech 6/10/2026
title_cn: SpaceX IPO多次超额认购 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 10 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Wall Street’s enthusiasm for SpaceX as the company’s IPO approaches. Plus, Google backstops Anthropic data centers as Silicon Valley races to build AI infrastructure with ever more intertwined deals. And, a new dashboard shows the real-time impact of AI on the labor market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New AI Research Offers Warning as US Embraces Its Use in Warfare
title_cn: 美国拥抱人工智能在战争中的应用，新的人工智能研究发出警告
summary: Findings serve as warning as Trump administration embraces AI in warfare

title: Signal President Threatens to Pull Messaging App Out of UK
title_cn: Signal 总统威胁将消息应用程序撤出英国
summary: Signal President Meredith Whittaker has once again threatened to pull the app from the UK over the government’s approach to tech regulation. Whittaker told The Mishal Husain Show that Signal “would rather exit a market than undermine the technical guarantees that people trust for their privacy.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Creative Artists, TPG Back $250 Million Fund for YouTube Talent
title_cn: 创意艺术家和 TPG 为 YouTube 人才提供 2.5 亿美元资金支持
summary: Creative Artists Agency, Hollywood’s biggest talent representative, is starting a new company to invest in YouTube stars and podcasters who want to be the next Oprah Winfrey or Reese Witherspoon.

title: US Launches Fresh Wave of Strikes Against Iran, Straining Truce
title_cn: 美国对伊朗发动新一波打击，紧张停战
summary: The US military said it had launched strikes against “multiple” targets in Iran for the second day in a row after President Donald Trump accused the country of dragging out talks on an interim peace deal.

title: US Inflation Picks Up to 3 Year High, Eroding Paychecks| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/10/2026
title_cn: 美国通胀升至三年高位，侵蚀薪资|彭博商业周刊日报 6/10/2026
summary: Today, Chris Kennedy, Bloomberg Economics lead for economic statecraft, breaks down the state of negotiations between the US and Iran and touches on the impact of pushback to Trump's Iran war policies at the ballot box. Then, Mike McKee, Bloomberg TV and radio international economics & policy correspondent, discusses the latest economic data as inflation accelerated in May to the fastest pace in more than three years. Plus, David Fortunato, CEO of robo advisor Wealthfront, on the investing landscape and how his company is approaching the upcoming SpaceX IPO. Finally, Bloomberg's Todd Gillespie & Sri Natarajan discuss fallout for Goldman Sachs as CEO David Solomon chooses to keep Kathryn Ruemmler at the bank despite her association with Jeffrey Epstein. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Refunds $22 Billion in Tariffs, Offseting Customs Revenue
title_cn: 美国退还 220 亿美元关税，抵消海关收入
summary: The US Treasury refunded nearly $22 billion in tariff revenue collected from importers in May, the first swath of such repayments since the Supreme Court struck down a major component of President Donald Trump’s trade policy.

title: Rollins Defends Screwworm Response as USDA Staff Cuts Draw Fire
title_cn: 罗林斯为美国农业部工作人员削减火力时的螺旋虫反应辩护
summary: US Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins pushed back on suggestions that staff cuts at her agency could slow the agency’s response to the outbreak of a deadly cattle parasite in the US.

title: Fate of Social Security Elevates the Stakes of Midterms
title_cn: 社会保障的命运提高了中期选举的风险
summary: Winners of Senate races this fall will be in office when the fund runs out.

title: Bill Gates Tells Congress Epstein Ties Were ‘Grave Error’
title_cn: 比尔·盖茨告诉国会爱泼斯坦的关系是“严重错误”
summary: Microsoft Corp. co-founder Bill Gates told a House panel investigating the late financier Jeffrey Epstein that his meetings with the sex offender were “a grave error in judgment.”

title: Brexit 10 Years Later: An Evening With Bloomberg Weekend
title_cn: 英国脱欧十年后：彭博周末之夜
summary: Alastair Campbell, co-host The Rest Is Politics, and Sir Jacob Rees-Mogg, presenter for GB News, talk about how the UK has changed since Brexit. They speak to Mishal Husain at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event held in London on June 10. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: University of Michigan Activists Indicted Over Campus Threats
title_cn: 密歇根大学活动人士因校园威胁被起诉
summary: Eight people connected to pro-Palestinian advocacy at the University of Michigan were charged with threatening campus leaders, businesses and a Jewish organization as part of a coordinated campaign to force the school to sever ties to Israel.

title: CFTC Floats Prediction Market Rule to Crack Down on War Bets
title_cn: CFTC 推出预测市场规则以打击战争押注
summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission unveiled a proposal for prediction markets Wednesday that would crack down on bets related to war, terrorism and assassination.

title: Trump Vows Iran Attacks | Balance of Power 6/10/2026
title_cn: 特朗普誓言袭击伊朗权力平衡 6/10/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Middle East. On today's show, former US Ambassador to the UN Nikki Haley, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Democratic Strategist Matt Robison and Republican Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Campbell and Rees-Mogg Clash on Everything But a New Brexit Vote
title_cn: 坎贝尔和里斯-莫格在除了新的脱欧公投之外的所有事情上都存在冲突
summary: Alastair Campbell and Jacob Rees-Moog share little common ground on Britain’s decision to leave the European Union a decade ago — except both agree a second vote to join is unlikely in the near future.

title: Trump, Modi Likely to Have First Meeting Since Pakistan Spat
title_cn: 特朗普和莫迪可能会进行自巴基斯坦发生争执以来的首次会面
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi will likely meet US President Donald Trump at the Group of Seven leaders’ summit next week, officials in New Delhi familiar with the matter said, their first face-to-face engagement since a fallout over Pakistan a year ago.

title: Hegseth Visits Guantanamo and Warns Cuba Against Seeking Weapons
title_cn: 赫格斯访问关塔那摩并警告古巴不要寻求武器
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth warned Cuba not to acquire armaments that could put the US military, or the US mainland, at risk.

title: Trump Vows Immediate Attacks on Iran, Straining Ceasefire
title_cn: 特朗普誓言立即袭击伊朗，紧张停火
summary: US President Donald Trump pledged fresh strikes on Iran after accusing the country of dragging out talks on an interim peace deal, putting further strain on a fragile two-month truce.

title: Will There Be Another Brexit Referendum?
title_cn: 还会有另一次脱欧公投吗？
summary: Alastair Campbell, co-host The Rest Is Politics and Sir Jacob Rees-Mogg, presenter for GB News, talk about if there should be another Brexit vote. They speak to Mishal Husain at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event held in London on June 10. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Our Politics Could Go to a Dark Place, Campbell Says
title_cn: 坎贝尔说，我们的政治可能会走向黑暗
summary: Alastair Campbell, co-host The Rest Is Politics, and Sir Jacob Rees-Mogg, presenter for GB News, talk about the state of British politics and extremism. They speak with Mishal Husain at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event held in London on June 10. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Screwworm Outbreak Isn’t Threat to Food Supply, Agriculture Secretary Says
title_cn: 农业部长表示，螺旋虫爆发不会对粮食供应构成威胁
summary: Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins sought to reassure senators Wednesday that the recent screwworm outbreak is under control and not a threat to the country’s food supply.

title: Trump Asks for Spy Law Extension as Pulte Pick Stokes Unease
title_cn: 特朗普要求延长间谍法，普尔特选择引发不安
summary: President Donald Trump has called on Congress to temporarily extend expiring electronic surveillance powers as he weighs his choice for a permanent National Intelligence director, signaling his controversial decision to appoint Bill Pulte acting chief will be short-lived.

title: Platner Wins Maine Senate Primary After String of Scandals
title_cn: 普拉特纳在一系列丑闻后赢得缅因州参议院初选
summary: Progressive Democrat Graham Platner won the party’s Senate primary in Maine after a bruising campaign which became as much about accusations of his past misbehavior as it was voters’ top concerns.

title: Trump Says US Will Resume Attacking Iran 'Very Hard' (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将“非常严厉”地恢复对伊朗的攻击（问答）
summary: President Donald Trump answers reporter questions from the Oval Office ahead of signing The Secure America Act. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Crisis Throws Further Doubt on Thames Water Deal
title_cn: 斯塔默危机让泰晤士水务交易进一步受到质疑
summary: The board of UK watchdog Ofwat remains locked in a stalemate over the future of Thames Water and the decision about the future of the utility is now complicated by a possible change in prime minister, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Trump Says US Won’t Renew USMCA, Must Be Treated Better by Canada and Mexico
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国不会续签USMCA，加拿大和墨西哥必须给予更好的待遇
summary: President Donald Trump said he would not reauthorize the US’s trade deal with Canada and Mexico. “I’m not looking to renew it,” Trump told reporters Wednesday at the White House. “We don’t need anything that Canada has, we don’t need anything that Mexico has, but they need everything that we have, and they have to treat us better.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Graham Platner Wins Democratic Senate Primary in Maine
title_cn: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳在缅因州赢得民主党参议院初选
summary: Progressive Democrat Graham Platner won the party’s Senate primary in Maine after a bruising campaign which became as much about accusations of his past misbehavior as it was voters’ top concerns. Tyler Kendall has more (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US Won’t Renew USMCA, Signaling Yearly Reviews
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国不会续签《美墨加协定》，标志着每年都会进行审查
summary: President Donald Trump said he would not reauthorize the US’s trade deal with Canada and Mexico, setting the stage for months or years of negotiations over provisions governing automobiles and other key industries.

title: Trump’s Pick for BLS Pledges to Maintain Agency’s Integrity
title_cn: 特朗普选择的劳工统计局承诺维持该机构的诚信
summary: Brett Matsumoto, President Donald Trump’s pick to lead the Bureau of Labor Statistics, told lawmakers he was committed to maintaining the integrity and independence of the agency.

title: EU Rebuffs US Call for Travel Bans to Contain Ebola Outbreak
title_cn: 欧盟拒绝美国关于遏制埃博拉疫情的旅行禁令的呼吁
summary: The European Union pushed back against US pressure to impose stricter travel restrictions to address an Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo and some areas of Uganda as the nation prepares to co-host the World Cup.

title: Residencias de ancianos alertan sobre una “calamidad” si haitianos dejan EE.UU.
title_cn: 疗养院警告称，如果海地人离开美国，将会发生“灾难”
summary: La Corte Suprema decidirá si Trump puede poner fin al estatus de protección de miles de inmigrantes. Algunos temen que eso desate una catástrofe en el sistema de salud.

title: Trump Says US Will Resume Attacking Iran 'Very Hard'
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将“非常严厉”地恢复对伊朗的攻击
summary: President Donald Trump vows to strike Iran again and scolds the country for delaying talks on an interim peace deal during remarks with reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Signs $70 Billion Measure to Fund Immigration Crackdown
title_cn: 特朗普签署700亿美元措施资助移民打击
summary: President Donald Trump signed a $70 billion package that fully funds immigration enforcement for the rest of his term, capping off a fight with dissident Republicans over a payout fund for political allies.
